basic_details.job_title: DGR Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Ex-Servicemen Welfare, Ministry of Defence (Directorate General Resettlement)
basic_details.short_information: Department of Ex-Servicemen Welfare, Ministry of Defence (Directorate General Resettlement) (DGR) Young Professional (HR) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the DGR Young Professional (HR) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA in HR, Post Graduate diploma in Business Administration (HR)
qualification.details: MBA in HR Post Graduate diploma in Business Administration (HR)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DGR Young Professional (HR) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DGR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DGR Young Professional (HR) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the DGR Young Professional (HR) recruitment is 17-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional (HR) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Young Professional (HR) post.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Young Professional (HR) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA in HR or a Post Graduate diploma in Business Administration (HR) to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online.

faq.question: Q5. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Department of Ex-Servicemen Welfare, Ministry of Defence (Directorate General Resettlement) (DGR).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for DGR Young Professional (HR) recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Young Professional (HR) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Young Professional (HR) position is Full Time.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of the Directorate General Resettlement (DGR)?
faq.answer: The official website of DGR is https://dirindia.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications must be submitted online only. Offline applications will not be accepted.
